name: White Chocolate Fudge Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 can Phillsbury Vanilla Creamy Supreme Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the frosting at medium speed.
2. Gradually add the white chocolate.
3. Beat at high speed for 30 seconds or until smooth and well blended.
4. Fold in vanilla and whipped frosting.
5. Refrigerate.
6. Spread on completely cooled cake.
7. Store cake in the fridge.
